nasb.text: Then his brothers also came and fell down before him and said, “Behold, we are your servants.”

esv.text: His brothers also came and fell down before him and said, “Behold, we are your servants.”

cnv.text: 他的哥哥們也親自來了，俯伏在他面前，說：“看哪，我們是你的奴僕。”

ccb.text: 约瑟的哥哥们来见他，俯伏在他面前，说：“我们是你的奴仆。”

csbs.text: 随后他的哥哥们也来，俯伏在他面前，说：“看哪，我们是你的奴仆！”
